focusedAudit.reason: 0.6.1 is a patch release of bounded correctness fixes (mouse side-button navigation, paste bracket escaping, block-selection survivor) with no new subsystem, write path, or platform integration; no focused change-cluster audit is required.

items.text: Mouse side buttons (back/forward, also called buttons 4/5) now navigate page history.

docs.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

website.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

blog.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

items.text: Copy-pasting block text that contains square brackets no longer backslash- escapes them (`[ref]` stays `[ref]` instead of becoming `\[ref\]`).

docs.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

website.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

blog.reason: Behavior fix to existing editor/navigation behavior; no documented feature, marketing page, or blog topic changes.

items.text: Deleting a block selection, and returning to a pane from pane-selection, now keep a block selected (and keyboard-navigable) instead of clearing it.
